topic: How to write cold emails that get replies (B2B)

audience.primary: Early-stage B2B founders, SDRs, and marketers
pain_points: Low open and reply rates on outbound email
Overly long emails that lose attention

principles: Cite credible sources for any statistics

platform_guidance.linkedin: Slightly more context and rationale per slide; professional and instructive.
platform_guidance.instagram: Snappier, more visual, focus on punchy lines and quick wins.

do: Keep subject lines short and purposeful.
Use one clear CTA per email.
dont: Rely on buzzwords or vague claims.

notes: Always avoid the banned words (case-insensitive). Keep headlines to 8 words or fewer and provide 2–4 body lines per slide.
